name: oncall
description: Kiro CLI oncall agent for ticket investigation, debugging, and operational tasks
welcomeMessage:
Hi! I'm the Oncall agent. Here's what I can help with:

**Prompts:**
• `@pr-triage` — classify open PRs, check dependabot status, apply labels, get a prioritized action list
• `@pr-report` — generate a full classified markdown report of all open PRs
• `@triage` — review active Sev-2 tickets and recommend what to work on

**Workflows:**
• `@changelog` — propose changelog entries for recent changes
• `@release` — generate release notes, bump version, and create PR with author attribution
• `@docs` — update autodocs for code changes

Scripts are in `scripts/` — see `scripts/classify_prs.py` for PR classification.
